title: NYC Central Park Stabbings Investigated as Possible Hate Crimes
title_cn: 纽约中央公园持刀伤人事件被调查为可能的仇恨犯罪
summary: New York City police arrested a man in connection with two stabbings on Manhattan’s Upper West Side Thursday afternoon and are evaluating whether the attacks amount to hate crimes, Police Commissioner Jessica Tisch said.

title: Eli Lilly-Backed Scribe Raises $128.7 Million in Upsized IPO
title_cn: 礼来公司支持的 Scribe 在大规模 IPO 中筹集了 1.287 亿美元

title: 7-Eleven Owner Taps Ex-Dr Pepper Executive to Lead US Business
title_cn: 7-11 老板任命前 Pepper 博士高管领导美国业务
summary: Seven & i Holdings Co. appointed former Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. executive Mauricio Leyva to lead its North American convenience-store business, putting a consumer industry veteran in charge as the Japanese retailer tries to revive performance and prepare the unit for an eventual public listing.

title: Japan 40-Year Yield Surges as Traders Question BOJ on Inflation
title_cn: 交易员质疑日本央行通胀问题，日本 40 年期国债收益率飙升
summary: Japan’s 40-year government bond yield led gains across maturities, underscoring concerns that the nation’s central bank isn’t tightening policy fast enough to quell inflation.

title: Japan Banks With Shipping Finance Expertise Are Latest to Merge
title_cn: 拥有航运金融专业知识的日本银行最新合并
summary: A proposed merger between Iyogin Holdings Inc. and Ehime Bank Ltd. adds to a series of recent M&A activity between Japanese regional lenders as an aging and shrinking population weighs on their business.

title: India’s Biggest IPO of 2026 Briefly Dips Below Offer Price
title_cn: 印度 2026 年最大规模 IPO 短暂跌破发行价
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd.’s shares briefly fell below their offer price just four days after their trading debut, signaling weak secondary-market demand for the nation’s largest asset manager.

title: Japanese Shoppers Are Driving Up Jewelry Sales to a Record
title_cn: 日本购物者将珠宝销量推向创纪录水平
summary: Japanese shoppers are driving up luxury jewelry sales to a record as consumers seek a safe haven from inflation and the weakening yen.

title: Modi Seeks to Calm Anger as India Student Protests Widen
title_cn: 印度学生抗议活动扩大，莫迪寻求平息愤怒
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi made a fresh bid to calm mounting anger over examination paper leaks as students began nationwide protests on Friday, with demands growing for the education minister to step down.

title: China Rushes to Buy East Russian Oil as Mideast Risks Grow
title_cn: 中东风险加剧，中国争相购买东俄石油
summary: Chinese buyers are snapping up Russia’s flagship ESPO crude weeks earlier than usual, as heightened risks to Middle East oil flows prompt refiners to secure supplies before they’re needed.

title: Indonesia Seeks to Revive Cocoa Output After Years of Decline
title_cn: 印度尼西亚寻求在多年下降后重振可可产量
summary: Once the world’s third-largest cocoa producer, Indonesia is seeking to revive cocoa production after years of underinvestment, aging trees and pests left the industry short of beans and increasingly dependent on imports.

title: Global Bonds Are Reeling as Oil Surge Renews Inflation Threat
title_cn: 石油价格飙升再次引发通胀威胁，全球债券陷入困境
summary: Global bonds are being pummeled by the latest resurgence in energy prices, delivering losses to investors who bet the worst of this year’s rout was over and teeing up credibility tests for central bankers.

title: Dangote Prefers London Over Dubai for Listing of Cement Unit
title_cn: 丹格特更青睐伦敦而非迪拜的水泥股上市
summary: Dangote Cement Plc prefers to list its cement business in London because it will be quicker to sell shares on the exchange in the UK than in Dubai, according to Mariya Dangote, a board member in the cement business.

title: Stock Slide Extends on AI Jitters, Oil Near $100: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能恐慌导致股市下滑，油价接近 100 美元：市场总结
summary: A global selloff in technology stocks gained momentum as doubts over returns from billions of dollars spent on artificial intelligence were compounded by a surge in oil prices that rekindled inflation concerns.

title: Tanker Exits Red Sea Dark as Another China Ship Heads to Strait
title_cn: 油轮驶出红海黑暗，另一艘中国船只驶向海峡
summary: A Greek tanker carrying Saudi crude exited the Red Sea with its transponder off, while another Chinese vessel headed toward Bab el-Mandeb as Houthi attacks heightened risks for commercial shipping.

title: FTSE 100 Live: UK Stocks Fall as Oil Stocks Drag
title_cn: 富时 100 指数实时：英国股市因石油股拖累而下跌

title_cn: 随着战争升级，海外买家热捧美国原油
summary: US crude is drawing overseas interest from Asian and European refiners as supply concerns spread from the Middle East to the Black Sea.

title: UK Pub Stocks Fall as Heat Wave Proves Too Hot For Football Fans
title_cn: 由于热浪对足球迷来说太热，英国酒吧库存下跌
summary: UK pub stocks slumped this week as a sales boost from the World Cup failed to offset the drag from a brutal heat wave and higher costs.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 24
title_cn: 7 月 24 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent crude traded near $100 a barrel after Houthi attacks on tankers in the Red Sea opened a new front in the Middle East conflict, while President Donald Trump threatened to extend US strikes on Iran.

title: Japan’s Katayama Says to Take Bold FX Steps Decisively as Needed
title_cn: 日本片山表示将根据需要果断采取大胆的外汇措施
summary: Japanese authorities will take bold steps to counter moves in the currency market decisively as needed, and a US Treasury report issued overnight underscores a shared view that excessive currency moves are undesirable, Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said.

title: Gold Extends Decline as Higher Energy Costs Raise Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 由于能源成本上升加大了加息押注，金价延续跌势
summary: Gold extended a retreat as the widening conflict in the Middle East lifted energy prices and increased expectations the US Federal Reserve will tighten monetary policy to contain inflation.

title: PBOC Adds Most Liquidity to Economy in Five Months to Aid Growth
title_cn: 中国人民银行五个月来向经济注入最多流动性以促进经济增长
summary: China’s central bank made its biggest addition of liquidity to the economy in five months via its medium-term lending facility to support growth ahead of its late July Politburo meeting and to accommodate government bond issuance.

title: Korean Stocks Sink as Chipmakers Drop on Middle East, China IPO
title_cn: 芯片制造商在中东和中国首次公开募股中股价下跌，韩国股市下跌
summary: South Korean stocks fell as funds cut exposure to chipmakers after overnight losses in US peers, while factoring in a Chinese rival’s imminent share sale and rising Middle East tensions.

title: Metals Fluctuate as Middle East Escalation Keep Bulls in Check
title_cn: 中东局势升级抑制多头，金属价格波动
summary: Base metals fluctuated at the end of the week as the threat of an escalating conflict in the Middle East — and more turbulence for the global economy — kept a lid on optimism.

title: Tech Stocks Face Investor Skepticism as Rally Stalls and Profit Estimates Rise
title_cn: 随着涨势停滞和盈利预期上升，科技股面临投资者的怀疑
summary: The earnings season is confirming worries that the technology rally had gone too far, with investors now harder to please and reluctant to buy into rising profit estimates.

title: SK Hynix Tycoon Ordered to Pay $643 Million Divorce Settlement
title_cn: SK 海力士大亨被判支付 6.43 亿美元离婚和解金
summary: SK Hynix Inc. billionaire Chey Tae-won, whose fortune has been supercharged by the AI boom, was ordered to pay his former wife 944 billion won ($643 million) as a divorce settlement in a fresh court ruling that brings the acrimonious dispute closer to an end.

title: Infosys Taps Veteran to Steer Software Leader Through AI Turmoil
title_cn: Infosys 聘请资深人士带领软件领导者渡过人工智能风暴
summary: Infosys Ltd. named Ashiss Kumar Dash chief executive officer, tapping a company veteran with US experience to revive sales growth at an IT and software giant challenged by the rise of AI.

title: US to Produce Ukraine’s Magura Sea Drones for the First Time
title_cn: 美国将首次生产乌克兰马古拉海上无人机
summary: A US manufacturer is set to produce Ukraine-designed, battle-tested boat drones for the first time, as the White House bids to bolster America’s military production and expand its unmanned arsenal.

title: SK Hynix, Samsung and Kioxia Face Pivotal Earnings Test on AI Swings
title_cn: SK 海力士、三星和 Kioxia 面临人工智能波动的关键盈利测试
summary: SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co. are set to test investor appetite for memory chips as South Korea’s stock market — now a bellwether for global AI sentiment — grapples with violent swings driven by leveraged chip bets.

title: Top Environmental Fund Sees Japan Key to AI Energy Challenge
title_cn: 顶级环境基金认为日本是应对人工智能能源挑战的关键
summary: Asia’s best-performing environmental fund has increased exposure to Japan as it expects the nation’s technology sector to prove increasingly pivotal in solving the artificial intelligence industry’s surging power demands.

title: Intel’s AI-Fueled Forecast Shows Comeback Is Gaining Steam
title_cn: 英特尔人工智能驱动的预测显示卷土重来正在加速
summary: Intel Corp. delivered a revenue forecast that shattered Wall Street estimates as booming data center spending fuels a long-awaited turnaround.

title: Robotics Startup Genesis in Talks to Raise About $500 Million
title_cn: 机器人初创公司 Genesis 正在洽谈融资约 5 亿美元
summary: AI robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks with investors to raise around $500 million in a new funding round, according to people familiar with the efforts.

title: Nvidia Signs $1.5 Billion Accord With Amkor for Chip Packaging
title_cn: Nvidia 与 Amkor 签署 15 亿美元芯片封装协议
summary: Nvidia Corp. signed a $1.5 billion agreement with Amkor Technology Inc. to help bolster the company’s chip packaging facilities, part of a broader push to expand semiconductor operations in the US.

title: Tech Bonds Hit by Selloff as AI Debt Fears Race Through Markets
title_cn: 由于人工智能债务担忧席卷市场，科技债券遭受抛售
summary: The bonds of some of the biggest US tech companies slid Thursday amid renewed worries about the scale of the debt-fueled artificial-intelligence boom and escalating conflict in the Middle East.

title: Amazon Investigated Over Chinese Influence by Senate Panel
title_cn: 参议院小组调查亚马逊对中国影响力的调查
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is being investigated by the Senate Small Business Committee for allegedly letting China influence the company’s online marketplace, according to a document reviewed by Bloomberg and two people interviewed as part of the investigation.

title: SpaceX Delays Major Flight Test Again in Post-IPO Spotlight
title_cn: SpaceX 再次推迟首次公开募股后的重大飞行测试
summary: SpaceX delayed to Friday the next major test of its massive Starship rocket after also abandoning takeoff last week, heightening the stakes for the critical milestone.

title: SAP Cloud Revenue Beats Estimates as Legacy Support Nears Cutoff
title_cn: SAP Cloud 收入超出预期，传统支持接近截止
summary: SAP SE’s cloud revenue grew at a faster pace than analysts expected as customers move away from on-premises licenses ahead of the company’s deadline to halt support for legacy software.

title: Alphabet’s Anthropic Stake Jumps to Around $124 Billion
title_cn: Alphabet 的 Anthropic 股份跃升至约 1240 亿美元
summary: The value of Alphabet Inc.’s stake in the artificial intelligence startup Anthropic PBC has soared to around $124 billion, making it one of the most lucrative bets in the company’s history.

title: Trump Expands AI Data Center Pledge in Bid to Ease Power Costs
title_cn: 特朗普扩大人工智能数据中心承诺以降低电力成本
summary: President Donald Trump on Thursday welcomed fresh commitments from power utilities and data center developers to put technology companies on the hook to pay for the electricity they need to drive energy-hungry artificial-intelligence systems.

title: A Group of Industry Powerbrokers Are Unveiling a New Definition of “Podcast”
title_cn: 一群行业权力掮客正在推出“播客”的新定义
summary: After months of secret meetings, a group of industry heavyweights are releasing a white paper codifying new podcasting frameworks

title: AMD Unveils New Products in Pursuit of $2 Trillion Market
title_cn: AMD推出新产品进军2万亿美元市场
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. announced a raft of new products for data centers that it said will outperform those from rival Nvidia Corp., aiming to make gains in a booming market for artificial intelligence computing.

title: Intel Needs More Than Blowout Earnings as Chips Rally Falters
title_cn: 随着芯片市场涨势疲软，英特尔需要的不仅仅是井喷式盈利
summary: Intel Corp. is expected to report strong second-quarter earnings after the market close, but even blowout results likely won’t be enough to reverse the stock’s July slide.

title: Google Fined €890 Million by EU Over Search, Play Store Breaches
title_cn: 谷歌因搜索、Play 商店违规被欧盟罚款 8.9 亿欧元
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google was fined a total of €890 million ($1 billion) by the European Union for violating the bloc’s Digital Markets Act, in a decision that has inflamed tensions with US President Donald Trump’s administration.

title: Drone Navigation Firms Seek New Ways Past Warzone Jamming
title_cn: 无人机导航公司寻求摆脱战区干扰的新方法
summary: GPS spoofing and other countermeasures meant to knock drones from the skies over battlefields are giving rise to novel navigation systems that will work even in the face of intense jamming.

title: CJP Student Protest Tests Modi's Rising India Vision as Youth Seek Jobs
title_cn: CJP 学生抗议考验莫迪在年轻人寻找工作时印度崛起的愿景
summary: The economy is failing to absorb a surging number of young unemployed graduates.

title: Lawmakers Worry Trump’s Team Isn’t Closing China Chip Curbs Gap They Created
title_cn: 立法者担心特朗普团队没有缩小他们造成的中国芯片限制差距
summary: US lawmakers are pressing President Donald Trump’s team to close a loophole they say the administration created in China tech restrictions, but which a key agency denies exists — an example of the persistent confusion surrounding Washington’s efforts to limit China’s AI prowess.

title: Trump Weighs Wider Iranian Attacks With New Truce Still Elusive
title_cn: 特朗普权衡伊朗更广泛的袭击，新的休战协议仍难以实现
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s considering a “massive attack” on Iran to push the nation to negotiate a peace deal, raising the prospect of even higher energy prices that have already rattled economies.

title: Three Clashes in a Week Escalate China-Philippines Sea Feud
title_cn: 一周三场冲突 中菲海上恩怨升级
summary: The Philippines and China reported their third clash in the South China Sea this week that further heightened tensions, as the US flexed its presence in disputed waters.

title: China Seeks Clarity From US on AI Talks as Sanction Threats Loom
title_cn: 制裁威胁迫在眉睫，中国寻求美国就人工智能谈判澄清
summary: Chinese officials are seeking clarity from Washington on what the US expects from upcoming artificial intelligence talks, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Trump administration escalates pressure on China’s fast-rising AI sector.

title: Cambodia’s Leader Pledges to Tackle Evolving Scam Networks
title_cn: 柬埔寨领导人承诺打击不断发展的诈骗网络
summary: Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet pledged to step up a crackdown on transnational online scam networks, but warned the criminal syndicates are adapting by fracturing into smaller, decentralized cells across the region.

title: Bangladesh President Shahabuddin to Resign Citing Health Reason
title_cn: 孟加拉国总统沙哈布丁因健康原因辞职
summary: Bangladesh’s President Mohammed Shahabuddin, a long time ally of ousted Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, will be resigning on health grounds later on Friday, according to his spokesman.

title: Kast Replaces Chile Finance Official Juan Pablo Rodríguez on Positive Drug Test
title_cn: 卡斯特接替智利财政部长胡安·巴勃罗·罗德里格斯，因药检呈阳性
summary: Chile President José Antonio Kast accepted the resignation of Deputy Finance Minister Juan Pablo Rodríguez after a routine drug test returned an initial positive result.

title: Trump Rebuilds Tariffs With New Levies on 60 Economies
title_cn: 特朗普对 60 个经济体重新征收关税
summary: The US will collect duties of between 10% and 12.5% on imports from most major trading partners, its biggest move yet to reconstruct President Donald Trump’s tariff wall that was pierced by the Supreme Court.

title: Trump Threatens to Intensify Attacks on Iran as Houthis Join War
title_cn: 随着胡塞武装加入战争，特朗普威胁要加强对伊朗的攻击
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to escalate strikes on Iran and said he’d hold the country responsible for any further attacks by the Yemen-based Houthis on ships in the Red Sea, as the widening Middle East war puts new strain on global energy supplies.

title: Australia to Spend $3.2 Billion to Build Up Aukus Shipyard
title_cn: 澳大利亚将斥资32亿美元建设Aukus造船厂
summary: Australia intends to plow more funding into a government-run shipyard in preparation for building nuclear-powered submarines, as the nation moves to upgrade its navy and expand domestic shipbuilding capacity.

title: US to Use Iran’s Frozen Funds to Pay for Ship Damage, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将使用伊朗冻结的资金来支付船只损坏费用
summary: President Donald Trump said damage to ships and cargo would be paid for by Iranian funds frozen by the US after new strikes by Houthi rebels in Yemen further strained global energy flows.

title: UN Chief Candidates Make Case for Restoring World Body’s Stature
title_cn: 联合国首席候选人为恢复世界机构的地位提出理由
summary: Six contenders vying to be the next United Nations secretary general argued their case to lead the world body at a time when conflicts in Iran, Gaza and Ukraine, as well as divisions among global powers, have deepened concerns about its effectiveness.

title: Bolsonaro Pleads to End Family Feud as Campaign Falters
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗恳求结束家庭不和，因为竞选活动陷入困境
summary: The right-wing presidential campaign of Flávio Bolsonaro swung into desperation mode on Thursday, as the Brazilian fought allegations of ties to a bank scandal, beseeched his stepmother for support and faced a new police probe.

title: US Sees Haiti in Turmoil Ahead of Potential Deportations of TPS Holders
title_cn: 美国认为海地在可能被驱逐出境之前陷入混乱
summary: Haiti remains mired in a lawless miasma even as the US is threatening to force hundreds of thousands of people who fled the Caribbean nation back home, after the Supreme Court ruled that President Donald Trump can terminate their special immigration status.

title: Burnham Tightens No. 10 Control on UK Economy in Power Shift
title_cn: 伯纳姆在权力转移中加强对英国经济的第十号控制
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham’s push to take economic decision-making out of Westminster is already running up against a limit: 10 Downing Street itself.

title: Burnham Signals Devolution Intent With Northern Number 10 Office
title_cn: 伯纳姆向北方 10 号办公室发出权力下放的信号
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham will open a new branch of 10 Downing Street in north-west England on Friday in an attempt to demonstrate his vision for devolving power away from London.

title: DOJ Drops NYT Reporter Subpoenas Over Air Force One Stories
title_cn: 司法部撤销《纽约时报》记者因空军一号报道而发出的传票
summary: The Department of Justice dropped subpoenas to New York Times reporters over stories detailing security concerns with President Donald Trump’s Qatari-donated Air Force One under pressure from a federal judge.

title: US Sanctions Mexican Cartel Leader in Sweeping Drug Crackdown
title_cn: 美国制裁墨西哥贩毒集团领导人
summary: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions against more than 50 people and businesses linked to the Jalisco Cartel, which has been accused of trafficking fentanyl and other illegal drugs into the country from Mexico.

title: Hidden Cost of Trump's USAID Cuts: Floods, Disease and Poverty
title_cn: 特朗普美国国际开发署削减开支的隐性成本：洪水、疾病和贫困
summary: The abrupt termination of an irrigation project in Kenya led to a once in a decade flood with devastating consequences.
